basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.post_name: Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has officially released the Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area Recruitment 2026 notification for 2 vacancies at its Lucknow campus. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree such as M.Com., MBA (Finance), B.Com. with MBA, CA, or CWA from a recognized institution with a minimum of 60% marks and aged below 38 years as on 31 May 2026 are eligible to apply online. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis and will receive a salary of ₹40,000 per month along with HRA as per institute norms. Interested applicants ca

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Less than 38 years of age as on May 31st 2026.
age_limit.details: Less than 38 years of age as on May 31st 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate (M.Com. or M.B.A. with specialization in Finance, or B.Com. with an M.B.A., or CA, or CWA) from a recognised institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Post Graduate (M.Com. or M.B.A. with specialization in Finance, or B.Com. with an M.B.A., or CA, or CWA) from a recognised institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks. Minimum three years of relevant research/project/teaching experience. Candidates with experience in IIM/IIT or institutes of national importance shall be preferred.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 40,000/- per month, plus HRA as per norms
salary_details.details: Rs. 40,000/- per month, plus HRA as per norms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Assistant position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area post at IIM Lucknow is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate degree (M.Com. or M.B.A. in Finance, or B.Com. with M.B.A., or CA, or CWA) from a recognized institution with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit is less than 38 years as of May 31st, 2026. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Academic Assistant for Finance & Accounting Area position at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the Google form provided.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Academic Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves interviews. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and then invited for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Academic Assistant position is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIM Lucknow prefer candidates with experience from specific institutions?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with relevant experience in IIMs, IITs, or other institutes of national importance will be preferred.
